text: Has anyone looked at SHOP-503 yet? The staging environment is completely rejecting the Stripe webhooks.
I'm digging into it now. It looks like the `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in the staging AWS Secrets Manager wasn't rotated when we updated the API keys yesterday.
Ah, that makes sense. <@U05SARAH>, make sure you follow the steps in the runbook: https://wiki.ecommerce.internal/spaces/ENG/pages/8821/Secret+Rotation+Protocol
Fixed. I rotated the secret and triggered a test event from the Stripe CLI. We are getting 200 OKs now. I'll move SHOP-503 to Review.
URGENT: iOS push notifications are dropping globally. PagerDuty just fired.
I created SHOP-504 to track this. <@U05SARAH>, did the backend team deploy any changes to AWS SNS this morning?
Checking AWS now... yes, the APNs certificates expired at midnight. I'm spinning up SHOP-505 to get them renewed immediately. Give me 15 minutes.
